titleJa: multi-agent workflow そのものが product surface になり始める
titleEn: Multi-agent workflow is starting to become a product surface in its own right
summaryJa: 2025年12月時点では、Foundry Agent Service の multi-agent workflows preview により、visual builder、YAML definition、templates、variables、observability、evaluators を備えた workflow 自体が product surface として見え始めていた。
summaryEn: By December 2025, the multi-agent workflows preview in Foundry Agent Service made the workflow itself visible as a product surface, with a visual builder, YAML definitions, templates, variables, observability, and evaluators.

publishedSources.label: Magentic-One: A Generalist Multi-Agent System for Solving Complex Tasks
RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
Microsoft: Announcing general availability of Azure AI Foundry Agent Service
Anthropic: Building agents with the Claude Agent SDK
Microsoft Azure: Agent Factory, designing the open agentic web stack
Microsoft: Introducing multi-agent workflows in Foundry Agent Service
